tools.name: tool_search
tools.title: Tool Search
tools.description: Search for relevant tools using keyword search over tool names, titles, and descriptions. Describe the capability you need in natural language. Returns matching tools that can then be invoked via call_tool.

limit.description: Maximum number of matches to return.

tools.name: call_tool
tools.title: Call Tool
tools.description: Invoke a discovered tool by name with arguments. Pass the tool name in the "name" field and parameters in "arguments". Example: {"name": "get_user", "arguments": {"user_id": "u-123"}}

name.description: The name of the tool to call.

arguments.description: The arguments to pass to the target tool.
